calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julie Lloyd, in propria persona, in court, Petitioner; Lillian Givens, via Zoom, for Jack Dorsey, Objector.

The court acknowledges the objection filed by Jack Dorsey and queries Ms. Lloyd as to the basis for her belief that Mr. Dorsey is deceased and points to the several unidentifiable documents submitted with the petition. Ms. Lloyd offers testimony to support of her position regarding Mr. Dorsey's status. Ms. Givens offers testimony regarding the status of her client and confirms that he is alive and asks the court to dismiss Ms. Lloyd's petition. Ms. Lloyd offers testimony in opposition to Ms. Given's statements.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is dismissed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.
